allow: Direct `git push` to `main` in this repository (wwee01/AlphaOS) is explicitly authorized as the standing workflow going forward — covers `git push origin main`, `git push origin HEAD:main`, and a bare `git push` while the current branch is `main`. Do not require per-push confirmation for these. This does NOT extend to `--force`/`--force-with-lease`, `git push --delete`, pushing to any branch other than `main`, or any other destructive/history-rewriting git operation — those still require explicit per-action confirmation.
